SEI: The boron-containing additive THFB participates in electro-reduction, forming CaI2/borides hybrid SEIs with enhanced Ca2+ conductivity, suppressing side reactions and reducing interface impedance.

The boron-containing additive BF₃·DE forms a boron-cross-linked polymeric matrix in the SEI, which allows for Ca²⁺ migration and favors calcium plating and stripping. It includes BO₃ groups, CaF₂, and TFSI decomposition products, with higher boron content at lower potentials promoting better performance.
Optimal_operating_temperature: 100°C (used for polarization and electrochemical measurements in the study)
